title: pteris dentata var. oligodyctyon
intro: Pteris dentata var. oligodyctyon, also known as Oligotrichum or Chinese brake, is a type of fern belonging to the family Pteridaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Pteris dentata var. oligodyctyon include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and other conditions associated with hormonal imbalance. In herbal preparations, Pteris dentata var. oligodyctyon is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or combined with other herbs to treat various health issues.
